title: ReplayBundleInventoryItem
description: An entry in the replay bundle inventory.

bundle_id.description: A unique identifier for this replay bundle.

run_id.description: The run identifier associated with this replay bundle.

status.description: The status of this replay bundle (e.g., available, archived).

generated_at.description: When this replay bundle was generated (ISO 8601).

signed.description: Whether this replay bundle has been cryptographically signed.

redacted.description: Whether this replay bundle has been redacted for export.

validation_status.description: The validation status of this replay bundle.

evidence_reference.description: A reference to this replay bundle in the evidence store.
